data.name: MY NEEDY NEIGHBOUR GIRLS
data.detailed_description:
These hot young women live in the same building as you, but they have no idea how to fix anything around the house. When their appliances break down or their car needs fixing, they call on you for help. But while you're doing that, there's a chance they'll get bored of waiting and decide to take matters into their own hands.

They can't stop thinking about sex, and their libidos are always going wild. So instead of making themselves useful by helping you, they end up seducing you for a quickie in the shower or on the couch.

Features:

- Unique match 3 puzzle mechanics!
- Sexy, slutty girls
- Gameplay that combines puzzle solving with visual novel!

Gameplay consists of solving a puzzle level. Once you've solved the puzzle you can move onto the next scene. There are 3 girls and each one has her own story and progression. You'll get to know these girls better and see more of their sexy bodies as you play through the game. Each girl is different!

data.short_description: You're the only man in the building and all your neighbours are girls who need your help, and they're all hot! They're completely helpless when it comes to fixing anything around the house, so you'll have to look after them whenever they need something.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit
